text: I’m taking the week off to rest, spend time with family, and reflect. I hope you have a chance to do the same. Happy holidays! And see you next week. P.S. If you’re looking for something to read or listen to, don’t miss my “[Best of Lenny’s Newsletter](https://www.lennysnewsletter.com/p/the-best-of-lennys-newsletter2024)” post. ![Image from Taking the week off 🎄🕎🎁](https://substack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/5bec1350-c197-4576-b7f1-15092bbbc32d_1170x1560.jpeg)
